creator: ludovit.koren@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

In the 10.2-RELEASE and 11.0-CURRENT (November 19) is not possible to configure working bridge interface on bce. It seems to me arp is not working on the interface. 

Similar problem was reported few years ago (140051 - https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=140051), but was closed because it could not be reproduced by submitter (no hardware available).

regards

lk
